scripts.test: npm run test:contracts && npm run test:trust && npm run typecheck
scripts.test:trust: rm -rf .tmp-trust-tests && tsc --module es2022 --target ES2022 --moduleResolution bundler --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp-trust-tests src/lib/__tests__/syncStatusTrustModel.test.ts src/lib/__tests__/persistenceReliability.test.ts src/lib/__tests__/persistenceSchemaHealth.test.ts src/store/slices/__tests__/metaSlice.syncMeta.test.ts src/store/__tests__/useAppStore.persistenceMeta.test.ts src/store/__tests__/persistenceMeta.recovery.test.ts && node --loader ./scripts/esm-extension-loader.mjs .tmp-trust-tests/lib/__tests__/syncStatusTrustModel.test.js && node --loader ./scripts/esm-extension-loader.mjs .tmp-trust-tests/lib/__tests__/persistenceReliability.test.js && node --loader ./scripts/esm-extension-loader.mjs .tmp-trust-tests/lib/__tests__/persistenceSchemaHealth.test.js && node --loader ./scripts/esm-extension-loader.mjs .tmp-trust-tests/store/slices/__tests__/metaSlice.syncMeta.test.js && node --loader ./scripts/esm-extension-loader.mjs .tmp-trust-tests/store/__tests__/useAppStore.persistenceMeta.test.js && node --loader ./scripts/esm-extension-loader.mjs .tmp-trust-tests/store/__tests__/persistenceMeta.recovery.test.js
